name: Ars Technica
description: In-depth technology journalism covering science, hardware, software, policy, and culture. Known for detailed technical analysis and long-form investigative pieces.

name: Hacker News
description: Tech and startup news aggregator run by Y Combinator. Upvote-driven discussion on programming, AI, startups, and science. The internet's best comment section.

name: TechCrunch
description: Breaking news on tech startups, venture capital, and the global tech industry. Covers fundraising rounds, acquisitions, IPOs, and product launches.

name: The Verge
description: Technology, science, and culture news. In-depth reviews, original reporting, and video content covering consumer tech, gaming, AI, and science.
